steps.title: Evaluate the equation as a list
steps.content: All choices use $x=0$, $2$, and $4$. Enter $x_1=[0,2,4]$ and compute $70x_1+8$. Desmos returns $[8,148,288]$.

steps.title: Match the output list
steps.content: Choice A is the only table with $y$-values $8$, $148$, and $288$ for those $x$-values. You can enter the choice A list as $a_1=[8,148,288]$ and compare it to $70x_1+8$.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Because choice A matches the whole output list, choice A is correct.
